chunks.title: Invocation and Lament
chunks.reason: The psalmist calls on God as Shepherd to restore the people and asks how long He will remain angry.

chunks.title: Parable of the Vine
chunks.reason: A metaphorical description of Israel as a vine planted by God that has been destroyed.

chunks.title: Petition for Revival
chunks.reason: A concluding plea for God's hand to rest on His people so they may be revived and call upon His name.
